hero.verse: Go therefore and make disciples of all the nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit.

about.label: About
about.title: A community of disciples
about.paragraph1: The International Christian Missionary Community (CMCI) is a movement of disciples devoted to Jesus Christ, our model in all things. Founded on the Word of God, our mission is to train disciples and reach the world with the Gospel.
about.paragraph2: In Belgium, we are a spiritual family united by faith and love for Christ. Our assemblies are places of growth, fellowship and true worship.
about.paragraph3: We believe in the power of the Holy Spirit to transform lives and impact nations. Each member is equipped and encouraged to fulfill God's plan for their life.
about.quote: Being a disciple of Jesus means making Him our absolute model in everything we think, say and do.

values.label: Our Pillars
values.title: Our Core Values

community.title: Community
community.description: We are a spiritual family united by the love of Christ, living in fellowship and mutual support.

missionary.title: Missionary
missionary.description: We are called to carry the Gospel everywhere, making disciples in all nations according to the commandment of Jesus.

christian.title: Christian
christian.description: Christ is our foundation, our model and our goal. We live by His Word and walk by His Spirit.

international.title: International
international.description: We welcome every nation in the love of God, reflecting the diversity of the Kingdom of heaven on earth.

values.closing: C.M.C.I. - Four letters, one mission: to transform the world through the power of the Gospel.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.title: Transforming the world through the Gospel

item1.title: Evangelise the world
item1.description: To reach 10 billion people with the Gospel in the power of the Holy Spirit, proclaiming the message of salvation to all nations.

item2.title: Make disciples
item2.description: 1 billion disciples in 250 nations organised into 25 million house churches by 2065, following the model of Jesus.

item3.title: Pray for revival
item3.description: To cooperate with God through fasting and intercession for worldwide revival, preparing the glorious return of our Lord.
